generatedSentence: A jaded analyst, one of eleven, watched the tech world evolve from her offline lounge, where forgotten viticulture tools began to molder, signaling prominent errors. Her flamboyant colleague, a former nurse, chewed gum, oblivious to the waymarker's pure effort to prevent a catastrophic nuke scenario, delivering a stroke of genius. It was a sucker's game, a factor of the theatric online doxing that had already hitched the company to a runaway train, making their valuables seem less secure, even inflight. As a loyal trailblazer, she oversaw operations, but recent glitches led to inevitable losses. The current leaders, a maculate cast, were notably obtuse, turning every notion into a dodgeball game, resulting in bacchanal-like outbreaks. Their unconditional support for an invalid boyfriend, an unemployed former emcee, caused a vapory panic; it was clear their faults and drawbacks, aplenty, had them blind to bigger threats, leading to a general cachexia of the system. The whistleblowing analyst, now a handicapped greyhound, made her first appeals from a dark gothic balcony. Her vigorous effort to choose a path of bravery meant defying leaders who'd rather lampoon her. They dared her to show proof, dismissing comments as static noise; she responded with a smackdown, exposing their blatant theft and how they'd shafted the public. She delivered her clip, revealing the twisting truth of how they would overpay, sending their reputation to the doghouse. The escalation was immediate, a final, unpardonable blowback as the analysts, once so meek, began judging the corrupt. She, with her hair tied back, understood the minefields ahead, yet the milkmen of justice had delivered. The alphabet of reform was written; there was no longer a need for earmuffs. Despite the lumpy powders and painful losses, the company could now exemplify a new chastity, embracing tweaks, understanding that the least act of truth can whopped the deepest corruption, leading to true peace.
panelSentences: A jaded analyst, one of eleven, watched the tech world evolve from her offline lounge, where forgotten viticulture tools began to molder, signaling prominent errors. Her flamboyant colleague, a former nurse, chewed gum, oblivious to the waymarker's pure effort to prevent a catastrophic nuke scenario, delivering a stroke of genius. It was a sucker's game, a factor of the theatric online doxing that had already hitched the company to a runaway train, making their valuables seem less secure, even inflight.

As a loyal trailblazer, she oversaw operations, but recent glitches led to inevitable losses. The current leaders, a maculate cast, were notably obtuse, turning every notion into a dodgeball game, resulting in bacchanal-like outbreaks. Their unconditional support for an invalid boyfriend, an unemployed former emcee, caused a vapory panic; it was clear their faults and drawbacks, aplenty, had them blind to bigger threats, leading to a general cachexia of the system.

The whistleblowing analyst, now a handicapped greyhound, made her first appeals from a dark gothic balcony. Her vigorous effort to choose a path of bravery meant defying leaders who'd rather lampoon her. They dared her to show proof, dismissing comments as static noise; she responded with a smackdown, exposing their blatant theft and how they'd shafted the public. She delivered her clip, revealing the twisting truth of how they would overpay, sending their reputation to the doghouse.

The escalation was immediate, a final, unpardonable blowback as the analysts, once so meek, began judging the corrupt. She, with her hair tied back, understood the minefields ahead, yet the milkmen of justice had delivered. The alphabet of reform was written; there was no longer a need for earmuffs. Despite the lumpy powders and painful losses, the company could now exemplify a new chastity, embracing tweaks, understanding that the least act of truth can whopped the deepest corruption, leading to true peace.
rawPanelSentences: A jaded analyst, one of eleven, watched the tech world evolve from her offline lounge, where forgotten viticulture tools began to molder, signaling prominent errors. Her flamboyant colleague, a former nurse, chewed gum, oblivious to the waymarker's pure effort to prevent a catastrophic nuke scenario, delivering a stroke of genius. It was a sucker's game, a factor of the theatric online doxing that had already hitched the company to a runaway train, making their valuables seem less secure, even inflight.

As a loyal trailblazer, she oversaw operations, but recent glitches led to inevitable losses. The current leaders, a maculate cast, were notably obtuse, turning every notion into a dodgeball game, resulting in bacchanal-like outbreaks. Their unconditional support for an invalid boyfriend, an unemployed former emcee, caused a vapory panic; it was clear their faults and drawbacks, aplenty, had them blind to bigger threats, leading to a general cachexia of the system.

The whistleblowing analyst, now a handicapped greyhound, made her first appeals from a dark gothic balcony. Her vigorous effort to choose a path of bravery meant defying leaders who'd rather lampoon her. They dared her to show proof, dismissing comments as static noise; she responded with a smackdown, exposing their blatant theft and how they'd shafted the public. She delivered her clip, revealing the twisting truth of how they would overpay, sending their reputation to the doghouse.

The escalation was immediate, a final, unpardonable blowback as the analysts, once so meek, began judging the corrupt. She, with her hair tied back, understood the minefields ahead, yet the milkmen of justice had delivered. The alphabet of reform was written; there was no longer a need for earmuffs. Despite the lumpy powders and painful losses, the company could now exemplify a new chastity, embracing tweaks, understanding that the least act of truth can whopped the deepest corruption, leading to true peace.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. Protagonist: A determined female analyst with short, sharp purple hair and a sleek, cybernetic arm. TOP-LEFT PANEL: Protagonist, hunched over a holographic interface, looking stressed, with a vibrant city visible through a high-rise window, eye-level shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: Protagonist, standing on a chaotic office floor littered with discarded tech and files, confronting a group of shadowy, faceless figures, wide shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: Protagonist, silhouetted on a rain-streaked, neon-lit gothic balcony, holding a glowing data chip, dramatic low-angle shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: Protagonist, standing tall and resolute amidst a now-clean, futuristic cityscape, a faint, hopeful smile on her face, medium shot.

definitions.definition: An act of stroking (moving one's hand over a surface).
definitions.example: She gave the cat a stroke.

definitions.definition: A blow or hit.
definitions.example: a stroke on the chin

definitions.definition: A single movement with a tool.
One of a series of beats or movements against a resisting medium, by means of which movement through or upon it is accomplished.
definitions.example: the stroke of a bird's wing in flying, or of an oar in rowing

definitions.definition: A powerful or sudden effort by which something is done, produced, or accomplished; also, something done or accomplished by such an effort.
definitions.example: a stroke of genius; a stroke of business; a master stroke of policy

definitions.definition: A line drawn with a pen or other writing implement, particularly:
A streak made with a brush.
The time when a clock strikes.
definitions.example: on the stroke of midnight

definitions.definition: A style, a single movement within a style.
definitions.example: butterfly stroke

definitions.definition: The loss of brain function arising when the blood supply to the brain is suddenly interrupted.
A sudden attack of any disease, especially when fatal; any sudden, severe affliction or calamity.
definitions.example: a stroke of apoplexy; the stroke of death

definitions.definition: The oar nearest the stern of a boat, by which the other oars are guided.
The rower who is nearest the stern of the boat.
Backstage influence.
A point awarded to a player in case of interference or obstruction by the opponent.
An individual discharge of lightning.
definitions.example: A flash of lightning may be made up of several strokes. If they are separated by enough time for the eye to distinguish them, the lightning will appear to flicker.

definitions.definition: The result or effect of a striking; injury or affliction; soreness.
An addition or amendment to a written composition; a touch.
definitions.example: to give some finishing strokes to an essay

definitions.definition: A throb or beat, as of the heart.
Power; influence.
Appetite.
In transactional analysis, a (generally positive) reaction to a person, fulfilling their needs or desires.
A person or animal that sucks, especially a breast or udder; especially a suckling animal, young mammal before it is weaned.
An undesired stem growing out of the roots or lower trunk of a shrub or tree, especially from the rootstock of a grafted plant or tree.
(by extension) A parasite; a sponger.
An organ or body part that does the sucking; especially a round structure on the bodies of some insects, frogs, and octopuses that allows them to stick to surfaces.
A thing that works by sucking something.
The embolus, or bucket, of a pump; also, the valve of a pump basket.
A pipe through which anything is drawn.

A small piece of leather, usually round, having a string attached to the center, which, when saturated with water and pressed upon a stone or other body having a smooth surface, adheres, by reason of the atmospheric pressure, with such force as to enable a considerable weight to be thus lifted by the string; formerly used by children as a plaything.
A suction cup.
An animal such as the octopus and remora, which adhere to other bodies with such organs.
Any fish in the family Catostomidae of North America and eastern Asia, which have mouths modified into downward-pointing, suckerlike structures for feeding in bottom sediments.
A lollipop; a piece of candy which is sucked.
A hard drinker.
An inhabitant of Illinois.

A migrant lead miner working in the Driftless Area of northwest Illinois, southwest Wisconsin, and northeast Iowa, working in summer and leaving for winter, so named because of the similarity to the migratory patterns of the North American Catostomidae.
A person who is easily deceived, tricked or persuaded to do something; a naive person.
definitions.example: One poor sucker had actually given her his life’s savings.

definitions.definition: A person irresistibly attracted by something specified.
definitions.example: A sucker for ghost stories.

definitions.definition: (British slang) The penis.
To strip the suckers or shoots from; to deprive of suckers.
definitions.example: to sucker maize

definitions.definition: To produce suckers, to throw up additional stems or shoots.
To move or attach itself by means of suckers.
To fool someone; to take advantage of someone.
definitions.example: The salesman suckered him into signing an expensive maintenance contract.

definitions.definition: One who, or that which, is pure.
To hit (the ball) completely cleanly and accurately
definitions.example: Tiger Woods pured his first drive straight down the middle of the fairway.

definitions.definition: To cleanse; to refine.
Free of flaws or imperfections; unsullied.
Free of foreign material or pollutants.
Free of immoral behavior or qualities; clean.
Mere; that and that only.
definitions.example: That idea is pure madness!

definitions.definition: (of a branch of science) Done for its own sake instead of serving another branch of science.
Of a single, simple sound or tone; said of some vowels and the unaspirated consonants.
(of sound) Without harmonics or overtones; not harsh or discordant.
To a great extent or degree; extremely; exceedingly.
definitions.example: You’re pure busy.

definitions.definition: To tire, weary or fatigue
To treat like a jade; to spurn.
To make ridiculous and contemptible.
Bored or lacking enthusiasm, typically after having been over exposed to, or having consumed too much of something.
Worn out, wearied, exhausted or lacking enthusiasm, due to age or experience.
Made callous or cynically insensitive, by experience.
The agricultural practice of growing grape vines.
definitions.example: The old French farmer practiced viticulture and raised some of the best grapes in the world. He was knowledgeable in viticulture.

definitions.definition: A wet nurse.
A person (usually a woman) who takes care of other people’s young.
definitions.example: They hired a nurse to care for their young boy.

definitions.definition: A person trained to provide care for the sick.
definitions.example: The nurse made her rounds through the hospital ward.

definitions.definition: One who, or that which, brings up, rears, causes to grow, trains, or fosters.
definitions.example: Eton College has been called "the chief nurse of England's statesmen".

definitions.definition: A shrub or tree that protects a young plant.
A lieutenant or first officer who takes command when the captain is unfit for his place.
A larva of certain trematodes, which produces cercariae by asexual reproduction.
A nurse shark.
To breastfeed: to feed (a baby) at the breast; to suckle.
definitions.example: She believes that nursing her baby will make him strong and healthy.

definitions.definition: To breastfeed: to be fed at the breast.
To care for (someone), especially in sickness; to tend to.
definitions.example: She nursed him back to health.

definitions.definition: To treat kindly and with extra care
definitions.example: She nursed the rosebush and that season it bloomed.

definitions.definition: To manage with care and economy
To drink slowly
To foster, to nourish
To hold closely to one's chest
definitions.example: Would you like to nurse the puppy?

definitions.definition: To strike (billiard balls) gently, so as to keep them in good position during a series of shots.
The royal poinciana (Delonix regia), a showy tropical tree.
Showy, bold or audacious in behaviour, appearance, etc.
Referring to the final stage of French Gothic architecture from the 14th to the 16th centuries.
A doer, maker; a person who does things for another person or organization.
definitions.example: The factor of the trading post bought the furs.

definitions.definition: An agent or representative.
A commission agent.
A person or business organization that provides money for another's new business venture; one who finances another's business.
A business organization that lends money on accounts receivable or buys and collects accounts receivable.
One of the elements, circumstances, or influences which contribute to produce a result.
definitions.example: The economy was a factor in this year's budget figures.

definitions.definition: Any of various objects multiplied together to form some whole.
definitions.example: 3 is a factor of 12, as are 2, 4 and 6.

definitions.definition: (causal analysis) Influence; a phenomenon that affects the nature, the magnitude, and/or the timing of a consequence.
definitions.example: The launch temperature was a factor of the Challenger disaster.

definitions.definition: A resource used in the production of goods or services, a factor of production.
A steward or bailiff of an estate.
To find all the factors of (a number or other mathematical object) (the objects that divide it evenly).
(of a number or other mathematical object) To be a product of other objects.
(commercial) To sell a debt or debts to an agent (the factor) to collect.
A team sport whose main objective is to dodge or catch balls thrown by the opposition.
The ball thrown in this sport.
To look at, see, or view for a period of time.

definitions.definition: To observe over a period of time; to notice or pay attention.
definitions.example: Put a little baking soda in some vinegar and watch what happens.

definitions.definition: To mind, attend, or guard.

definitions.definition: To be wary or cautious of.

definitions.definition: To attend to dangers to or regarding.
definitions.example: Watch what you say.

definitions.definition: To remain awake with a sick or dying person; to maintain a vigil.
To be vigilant or on one's guard.
definitions.example: For some must watch, while some must sleep: So runs the world away.

definitions.definition: To act as a lookout.
(of a buoy) To serve the purpose of a watchman by floating properly in its place.
To be awake.
To be on the lookout for; to wait for expectantly.
(often in the plural) The flesh around the teeth.
To chew, especially of a toothless person or animal.
To deepen and enlarge the spaces between the teeth of (a worn saw), as with a gummer.
Relating to acting or the theater, theatrical.
To take (a system, etc.) offline; to demote from an active or online state.

Of a system, currently not connected (generally electrically) to a larger network. For example, a power plant which is not connected to the grid, or a computer which is not connected to the Internet or to any other communications service.
definitions.example: I saved the web pages so I could read them later offline.

definitions.definition: (by extension) Happening in the physical world (the real world) as opposed to on the internet.

definitions.definition: While offline; with an offline system.
Outside the current meeting, in a more private setting.
Occurring, or provided for use during a flight

definitions.definition: A vehicle that has two wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.
A traveling block used on a cable in skidding logs.
The best possible hand in lowball.
A motorbike.
(usually in compounds specifying a context) a slut; a promiscuous woman
To travel or exercise using a bicycle.
One who molds something into shape.

One or more mistakes in a trial that could be grounds for review of the judgement.

Objects designed to cover a person's ears for protection against cold or noise. They consist of a thermoplastic or metal head-band, that fits over the top of the head, and a pad at each end, to cover the external ears.
A cricket team of eleven players. Hence first eleven - the team of best cricket players (at a school), second eleven - the "B" team, etc.
A football team of eleven players; the starting lineup.
Used instead of ! to amplify an exclamation, imitating someone who forgets to press the shift key while typing exclamation points.

Standing out, or projecting; jutting; protuberant
Likely to attract attention from its size or position; conspicuous
Eminent; distinguished above others
Valuable items collectively.

A nuclear power station.

A microwave oven.

definitions.definition: To destroy or erase completely.

definitions.definition: To over-analyze or overly despair over something.

To survey, look at something in a wide angle.
To supervise, guide, review or direct the actions of a person or group.

definitions.definition: To fail to see; to overlook, ignore.

To spot; to stain; to blur.
Marked with spots or maculae; blotched.

To be an instance of or serve as an example.

A fight; a beating, a physical or emotional confrontation.
(focus) As a pointed example; in a notable manner.
A systemic wasting of muscle tissue, with or without loss of fat mass, that accompanies a chronic disease.
A pigmented filament of keratin which grows from a follicle on the skin of humans and other mammals.
The collection or mass of such growths growing from the skin of humans and animals, and forming a covering for a part of the head or for any part or the whole body.

A cellular outgrowth of the epidermis, consisting of one or of several cells, whether pointed, hooked, knobbed, or stellated.
definitions.example: Internal hairs occur in the flower stalk of the yellow frog lily (Nuphar).

definitions.definition: A locking spring or other safety device in the lock of a rifle, etc., capable of being released by a slight pressure on a hair-trigger.

Any very small distance, or degree; a hairbreadth.

To remove the hair from.
To grow hair (where there was a bald spot).

A defect; something that detracts from perfection.

Blame; the responsibility for a mistake.

Want; lack
A lost scent; act of losing the scent.

The inhalation of a lungful of smoke from a cigarette.
Having or demonstrating undivided and constant support for someone or something.
Firm in allegiance to a person or institution.
Faithful to a person or cause.
An evergreen shrub or small tree of the genus Myrtus, native to southern Europe and north Africa.
(of people) Very high-spirited; extremely energetic and enthusiastic.

definitions.definition: (of things that grow) Abundant, luxuriant.
definitions.example: exuberant foliage

definitions.definition: The work involved in performing an activity; exertion.
definitions.example: It took a lot of effort to find a decent-sized, fully-furnished apartment within walking distance of the office.   He made a conscious effort to not appear affected by the stories in the paper.

definitions.definition: An endeavour.
definitions.example: Although he didn't win any medals, Johnson's effort at the Olympics won over many fans.

definitions.definition: A force acting on a body in the direction of its motion.
To make an effort.
To strengthen, fortify or stimulate
To fail to care for or attend to something.

definitions.definition: To omit to notice; to forbear to treat with attention or respect; to slight.

Suffering from neglect.
In a generous or overlarge quantity.

definitions.definition: Enough or more than enough.
A playing card.
(in the plural) Any game using playing cards; a card game.

definitions.definition: A resource or an argument, used to achieve a purpose.

definitions.definition: Any flat, normally rectangular piece of stiff paper, plastic etc.
A map or chart.
An amusing or entertaining person, often slightly eccentrically so.

definitions.definition: A business card.

definitions.definition: A placeholder name for an unnamed, unspecified, or hypothetical manufactured good or product.

A type of action where the pressure from the fired cartridge blows a sliding mechanism backward to extract the fired cartridge, chamber another cartridge, and cock the hammer.
An unintended adverse result, especially of a political action.

A rapper.

Initialism of medium coeli, the midheaven or highest point in the sky. Contrasted to Imum Coeli.

To act as the master of ceremonies (for).
To rap as part of a hip-hop performance.

A building founded for the long-term care of its residents, such as an almshouse. The residents may have no physical ailments, but simply need financial support.
A place of lodging.
Someone who acts as a host at a formal event.
Someone who conducts a programme of varied entertainment, for example by introducing performers to the audience.
A rapper.
Dichloromethane
A viral infection of the skin or (occasionally) mucous membranes, caused by Molluscum contagiosum virus (MCV), a DNA poxvirus.
A group of individuals whose primary interests and activities involve motorcycles.
A place used as a hospital on board a ship, on a spaceship (in science fiction).
A room or area for the treatment of the sick or injured in a school.
An application for the removal of a cause or suit from an inferior to a superior judge or court for re-examination or review.
The mode of proceeding by which such removal is effected.
The right of appeal.

An accusation; a process which formerly might be instituted by one private person against another for some heinous crime demanding punishment for the particular injury suffered, rather than for the offense against the public.
An accusation of a felon at common law by one of his accomplices, which accomplice was then called an approver.
A summons to answer to a charge.
A call to a person or an authority for help, proof or a decision; entreaty.

definitions.definition: Resort to physical means; recourse.
Power to attract or interest.
A call to or use of a principle or quality for purposes of persuasion.
To call upon another to decide a question controverted, to corroborate a statement, to vindicate one's rights, etc.
To call on (someone) for aid
definitions.example: I appeal to all of you to help the orphans.

definitions.definition: (informal elsewhere) To apply for the removal of a cause from an inferior to a superior judge or court for the purpose of reexamination or for decision.
To be attractive.

definitions.definition: To ask an umpire for a decision on whether a batsman is out or not, usually by saying "How's that" or "Howzat".
To accuse (someone of something).
To summon; to challenge.
To invoke (used with to).
A challenge to prove courage.
The quality of daring; venturesomeness; boldness.
Defiance; challenge.
To have enough courage (to do something).

definitions.definition: To defy or challenge (someone to do something)

definitions.definition: To have enough courage to meet or do something, go somewhere, etc.; to face up to

definitions.definition: To terrify; to daunt.
To catch (larks) by producing terror through the use of mirrors, scarlet cloth, a hawk, etc., so that they lie still till a net is thrown over them.
To stare stupidly or vacantly; to gaze as though amazed or terrified.
To lie or crouch down in fear.
A small fish, the dace.
Any small house or structure or enclosure used to house a dog.
A structure of small size, similar to a doghouse, but offering useful shelter for a human.
Mechanically, an equipment cover with an opening, with a shape resembling a doghouse.
A difficult or demoralizing situation.
A traffic signal with five sections: two on the bottom, two in the middle, and one on top.
Any shabby or disreputable establishment.
The digit or figure 1.
The neutral element with respect to multiplication in a ring.
A one-dollar bill.
One run scored by hitting the ball and running between the wickets; a single.
A joke or amusing anecdote.
A particularly special or compatible person or thing.

definitions.definition: (leet) Used instead of ! to amplify an exclamation, parodying unskilled typists who forget to press the shift key while typing exclamation points, thus typing "1".

definitions.definition: To cause to become one; to gather into a single whole; to unite.
Of a period of time, being particular.

definitions.definition: Being a single, unspecified thing; a; any.

definitions.definition: Sole, only.

definitions.definition: Whole, entire.

definitions.definition: In agreement.

definitions.definition: The same.

definitions.definition: Being a preeminent example.

definitions.definition: Being an unknown person with the specified name; see also "a certain".

definitions.definition: The number represented by the Arabic numeral 1; the numerical value equal to that cardinal number.

definitions.definition: The first positive number in the set of natural numbers.
The cardinality of the smallest nonempty set.
The ordinality of an element which has no predecessor, usually called first or number one.
(impersonal pronoun, indefinite) One thing (among a group of others); one member of a group.
definitions.example: Any one of the boys.  The big one looks good.  I want the green one.  A good driver is one who drives carefully.

definitions.definition: (impersonal pronoun, sometimes with "the") The first mentioned of two things or people, as opposed to the other.
definitions.example: She offered him an apple and an orange; he took one and left the other.

definitions.definition: (indefinite personal pronoun) Any person (applying to people in general).

definitions.definition: (pronoun) Any person, entity or thing.

definitions.definition: The result of no longer possessing an object, a function, or a characteristic due to external causes or misplacement.

definitions.definition: The destruction or ruin of an object.
Something that has been destroyed or ruined.

definitions.definition: Defeat; an instance of being defeated.

definitions.definition: The death of a person or animal.

definitions.definition: The condition of grief caused by losing someone or something, especially someone who has died.

definitions.definition: (financial) The sum an entity loses on balance.

definitions.definition: Electricity of kinetic power expended without doing useful work.

definitions.definition: A written attack or other work ridiculing a person, group, or institution.
To satirize or poke fun at.
Any person that leads or directs
An animal that leads
Someone or something that leads or conducts
An accessible structure extending from a building, especially outside a window.
An accessible structure overlooking a stage or the like.

definitions.definition: Having no job despite being able and willing to work.
Having no use, not doing work

definitions.definition: The meal eaten at such a gathering.
An easy or pleasant task.

definitions.definition: An entertainment at which each person contributed some dish to a common table.
To take part in a picnic.
Resembling vapor; vaporous.
Characterized by the presence of vapor; full of, or obscured by, vapor.
An act or instance of nominating.
A device or means by which a person or thing is nominated.
Something which clips or grasps; a device for attaching one object to another.

definitions.definition: An unspecified but normally understood as rapid speed or pace.

definitions.definition: An embrace.
A frame containing a number of bullets which is intended to be inserted into the magazine of a firearm to allow for rapid reloading.
A projecting flange on the upper edge of a horseshoe, turned up so as to embrace the lower part of the hoof; a toe clip or beak.
A gaff or hook for landing the fish, as in salmon fishing.
To grip tightly.
To fasten with a clip.

definitions.definition: To hug, embrace.
To collect signatures, generally with the use of a clipboard.
The person or thing in the first position.

definitions.definition: The first gear of an engine.
Something that has never happened before; a new occurrence.

definitions.definition: A first-class honours degree.
A first-edition copy of some publication.

definitions.definition: Preceding all others of a series or kind; the ordinal of one; earliest.

definitions.definition: Most eminent or exalted; most excellent; chief; highest.

definitions.definition: Before anything else; firstly.

definitions.definition: For the first time;

definitions.definition: To send, signal, or call by a whistle.

To break forth.
To pay too much.
To be more than an ample reward for.
Not valid; not true, correct, acceptable or appropriate.

definitions.definition: A male partner in an unmarried romantic relationship.

(of somebody's age) old, mature. Used to imply that somebody is too old for something, or acting immaturely.
To make or become bigger.

definitions.definition: To criticize or label another person or thing.

A distortion to the meaning of a word or passage.

A rotation of the body when diving.
A sprain, especially to the ankle.
A twig.
A girl, a woman.

A small roll of tobacco.

A beverage made of brandy and gin.

definitions.definition: An appetite for food.

To join together by twining one part around another.
To contort; to writhe; to complicate; to crook spirally; to convolve.

definitions.definition: To turn a knob etc.
To distort or change the truth or meaning of words when repeating.
To form a twist (in any of the above noun meanings).

To cause to rotate.
To dance the twist (a type of dance characterised by twisting one's hips).
To coax.
In the game of blackjack (pontoon or twenty-one), to be dealt another card.
The disreputable practice of selling unnecessary insurance to a customer in order to earn commission.
Having many twists

definitions.definition: The method by which a device performs its function.
The method or practice by which actions are done.
The act or process of operating; agency; the exertion of power, physical, mechanical, or moral.
A planned undertaking.

definitions.definition: A business or organization.

definitions.definition: A surgical procedure.

definitions.definition: A procedure for generating a value from one or more other values (the operands).
A military campaign (e.g. Operation Desert Storm)
Effect produced; influence.
Final, ultimate, coming after all others of its kind.

definitions.definition: Most recent, latest, last so far.

definitions.definition: Supreme; highest in degree; utmost.

definitions.definition: Most recently.

definitions.definition: (sequence) after everything else; finally

definitions.definition: A waiting room in an office, airport etc.
A domestic living room.
An establishment, similar to a bar, that serves alcohol and often plays background music or shows television.
A large comfortable seat for two or three people or more, a sofa or couch; also called lounge chair.
The act of one who lounges; idle reclining.
To relax; to spend time lazily; to stand, sit, or recline, in an indolent manner.
(usually uncountable) Being brave, courageousness.
A brave act.

Defined for the class itself, as opposed to instances of it; thus shared between all instances and accessible even without an instance.
The set of letters used when writing in a language.

definitions.example: antenna horn

definitions.definition: Generally, any brass wind instrument.
(from the horn-shaped earpieces of old communication systems that used air tubes) A telephone.
definitions.example: Get him on the horn so that we can have a discussion about this.

definitions.definition: (definite article) An erection of the penis.
A peninsula or crescent-shaped tract of land.
definitions.example: to navigate around the horn

definitions.definition: A diacritical mark that may be attached to the top right corner of the letters o and u when writing in Vietnamese, thus forming ơ and ư.
An incurved, tapering and pointed appendage found in the flowers of the milkweed (Asclepias).
(of an animal) To assault with the horns.
To furnish with horns.
To cuckold.
To dull or reduce an emotion or a physical state.
Blunt; not sharp, pointed, or acute in form.
Intellectually dull or dim-witted.
Of sound, etc.: deadened, muffled, muted.
Indirect or circuitous.
Something of the smallest possible extent; an indivisible unit.
Used for forming superlatives of adjectives, especially those that do not form the superlative by adding -est.
definitions.example: It was the least surprising thing.

definitions.definition: In the smallest or lowest degree; in a degree below all others.
definitions.example: They travel the least of all.
